sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the 3x6 box has moved RIGHT and is now partially outside the charcoal box frame on the right side. The box is now at the right edge of the charcoal box, with its right edge extending beyond the frame.
Let me check the exact position of the 3x6 box now.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        r_min = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        r_max = max(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        c_min = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        c_max = max(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        print(f"Green: id={n['id']}, size={r_max-r_min+1}x{c_max-c_min+1}, rows {r_min}-{r_max}, cols {c_min}-{c_max}")

# Check the charcoal box
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] > 10:
        r_min = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        r_max = max(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        c_min = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        c_max = max(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        print(f"Charcoal: id={n['id']}, size={r_max-r_min+1}x{c_max-c_min+1}, rows {r_min}-{r_max}, cols {c_min}-{c_max}, children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The 3x6 box is now at cols 57-62. The charcoal box is at cols 53-60, interior cols 54-59. So the 3x6 box is at cols 57-62, which means:
- Left edge of box: col 57
- Right edge of box: col 62
- Interior of charcoal box: cols 54-59
So the box overlaps with the interior from cols 57-59 (3 columns of overlap). The box extends beyond the right edge of the charcoal box (cols 60-62).
The charcoal box id=10 has children=[], meaning the 3x6 box is NOT inside it.
So moving the 3x6 box RIGHT too far caused it to overshoot the charcoal box. I need to move it LEFT to get it back into the charcoal box.
The charcoal box interior is cols 54-59. The 3x6 box is 6 columns wide. To fit exactly inside, the box should be at cols 54-59. Currently it's at cols 57-62. So I need to move it LEFT by 3 columns (57-54=3).
Let me move LEFT 3 times.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move the 3x6 box LEFT 3 times to center it in the charcoal box
# Current: cols 57-62, target: cols 54-59
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
